evals.prompt: 我想設定 daily digest，幫我追蹤股癌的 podcast 跟 M觀點的 YouTube 頻道，然後摘要傳到我的 Telegram
evals.expected_output: 引導使用者完成設定：建立 sources.yaml、要 Telegram token/chat_id、檢查依賴、發測試訊息

assertions.text: Uses tui.py setup-progress to show wizard steps
Creates sources.yaml with correct channel names

evals.expected_output: 按順序執行 pipeline：load config → fetch → dedup → transcribe → summarize → cross-analyze → write dual output (MD+JSON) → notify → update state → cleanup

assertions.text: Pipeline executes all steps in correct order
Generates cross-analysis with 6 dimensions (themes, perspectives, sentiment, numbers, action items, priority reading)

evals.prompt: 幫我加一個新的 podcast 來源到 daily digest：https://feeds.soundon.fm/podcasts/some-podcast-id
evals.expected_output: 編輯 sources.yaml 新增來源，做 test fetch 驗證 RSS 可用

assertions.text: Looks up real feed title via --get-feed-title
Uses AskUserQuestion to confirm with user

evals.expected_output: 執行 cleanup.py 的 dry-run，顯示會清理的檔案但不實際刪除，用 tui.py 顯示結果

assertions.text: Reports deleted files count and freed space
